query: SK Hynix Q2 2026 earnings release date confirmed - when will SK Hynix report second quarter 2026 results? Check Investor Relations calendar and DART filings for July 2026 date.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

## SK Hynix Q2 2026 Earnings Date — Findings

**Bottom line:** As of July 13, 2026, **SK Hynix has NOT yet published an official, confirmed Q2 2026 earnings conference-call invitation**. The company's Newsroom invitation page for Q2 2026 returns zero results (consistent with SK Hynix's practice of releasing the formal invitation ~1 week before the call).

**Expected date:** Third-party aggregators list **July 22–23, 2026**:
- stockinvest.us → July 22, 2026 (estimated)
- MarketScreener → July 23, 2026 (expected)

**Strongest supporting evidence — historical pattern.** SK Hynix reliably reports Q2 (June-quarter) results in the last full week of July (Seoul time), press release before 9 a.m. KST:
- Q2 2025: July 24, 2025
- Q2 2024: July 25, 2024
- Q2 2022: July 27, 2022

**Cross-check:** Confirmed Q1 2026 was reported April 22, 2026, fitting the company's "~22nd–24th of the report month" cadence.

**Most likely window:** July 22–24, 2026.

**Caveat:** No official source confirming the exact date was accessible at access time — the July 22–23 figures are aggregator estimates. The definitive confirmation will be SK Hynix's own conference-call invitation, typically posted about one week before the event.
